title: Tracy brought tennis to thousands over 30 years in Alaska
summary: Cathy Tracy, who touched almost every person who picked up a tennisracket in Anchorage during her three decades as the city's biggestbooster of the game, collapsed and died Sunday while attending a U.S.Professional Tennis Association board meeting in Phoenix.

title: $15 meals not enough for state's legislators
summary: Alaska lawmakers are talking about rolling back one of the highest-profile pieces of ethics reform passed during the heat of the federal corruption investigation: the requirementthat lobbyists report buying legislators any meal or drink over $15.

summary: A recently released batch of state e-mails shows former "First Dude" Todd Palin as intimately involved in state affairs -- too intimately, some say.

title: UAA student helps Tonga gain a library
summary: For Kato Ha'unga, too many books is not enough. The woman's a little obsessed. But then these are books with a purpose. If she can make it happen -- and she's confident she can -- these are books bound for Tonga. A tsunami of books inspired by a tsunami.
